top_trace.command: Lift the object above the table height threshold while maintaining a stable opposing grasp.

base.command: Move the palm/base to stay centered over the object at x=-0.0394, y=-0.0383 and raise upward enough for the object to exceed z=0.075 while keeping the palm steady and aligned with the object.
Set base_x to -0.0394 to center over object x.
Set base_y to -0.0383 to center over object y.
Move base_z upward from 0.0262 to -0.0350 so the controlled object rises above z=0.075.
Hold base_x/base_y/base_z steady and monitor object height and alignment.

thumb.command: Relative to the lifted palm, keep the thumb flexed near closed to maintain firm right-side contact and prevent the object from slipping during the upward motion.
Hold thumb joint g_right at near-closed flexion to maintain firm contact.

index.command: Relative to the lifted palm, keep the index finger flexed near closed to maintain opposing left-side contact and stabilize the object against the thumb.
Hold g_left near closed at 0.0600 for opposing left-side contact.
